string.text: Oooh, yeah. That's what I'm talkin' about! Tell ya what...since you helped me out, I'll let you have a look at some of the nicer stuff.
Oh, fuck. You're the best, man. Come back tomorrow - I've got a couple pieces saved from the last shipments that I think you'll like.
Wow, you actually fuckin' did it! Thanks, pal. You're the best. Tell you what, a top-shelf guy like you deserves some top-shelf goods. Come back tomorrow! I guarantee you'll like what I've got.
